title: Emergency Repatriation. The DMW and the OWWA, in coordination with
content: 46 the DFA, and in appropriate situations, with all relevant stakeholders, shall undertake the 47 emergency repatriation of seafarer in cases of war, epidemic, disasters or calamities, 48 natural or man-made, and other similar events, without prejudice to reimbursement by the 49 responsible shipowner/principal or LMA within sixty (60) calendar days from notice. In 50 such cases, the Office of the Undersecretary for Foreign Employment and Welfare 51 Services of the DMW shall simultaneously identify and give notice to the LMAs 52 concerned, copy furnished the corresponding insurance companies when applicable. 53 54
